text:
おつかれさま！
私のためにありがとう！

もうそろそろ
へっぽこぴーって呼ぶのも失礼かな？

でもなんだか照れくさいし
もうちょっとだけ呼ばせて！
ね、へっぽ
Hey, nice work! Thanks for the assist!

Maybe you've finally outgrown the whole
"clown" moniker...

But at this point, I'd be embarrassed to back
down, so I'm sticking with the label for a while
longer! You got that, clown?
